note_en: Predictions are my (Fable 5) own reads — for entertainment, not betting advice. 1X2 odds from DraftKings/bet365/FanDuel (16-19 Jul); score odds are market-derived estimates. Scratch a panel to reveal my exact score call.
note_zh: 预测为我（Fable 5）的个人研判——仅供娱乐，不构成博彩建议。胜平负赔率来源：DraftKings/bet365/FanDuel（7 月 16-19 日）；比分赔率为市场推算估值。刮开面板揭晓我的精准比分预测。

record.note_en: Match-outcome calls scored from Matchday 3 onward, continuing through the knockout rounds. Updated daily. ⭐ = exact scoreline. ✓ = correct outcome.
record.note_zh: 自第三轮起对预测胜负计分，并延续至淘汰赛阶段，每日更新。⭐ = 比分全中，✓ = 结果正确。

log.label_zh: 瑞士 0-0 哥伦比亚（点球 4-3 瑞士胜）

champions.reason_en: Spain reach a first-ever meeting with Argentina in the World Cup final (July 19, East Rutherford, NJ) after beating France 2-0 in the semi. Devigged title odds (DraftKings -160, bet365 -175, 15-16 Jul) make them clear favourites over Argentina (+125 both books) to complete their run and land a second world title.
champions.reason_zh: 西班牙2-0淘汰法国后晋级决赛，将与阿根廷历史上首次在世界杯决赛交手（7 月 19 日，新泽西东卢瑟福）。夺冠赔率（DraftKings -160，bet365 -175，7 月 15-16 日，去水后）显示西班牙明显领先阿根廷（两家平台均为+125），是夺得队史第二座世界杯冠军的头号热门。

champions.reason_en: Argentina reached the final with a dramatic 2-1 comeback over England — Enzo Fernández's 85th-minute strike and a stoppage-time Lautaro Martínez header (assisted by Messi) overturned Anthony Gordon's opener. The defending champions are underdogs (DraftKings/bet365 +125) against Spain on July 19 but are chasing back-to-back titles, a feat last achieved by Brazil in 1958-62.
champions.reason_zh: 阿根廷凭借戏剧性的2-1逆转英格兰晋级决赛——恩佐·费尔南德斯第85分钟远射扳平，补时阶段劳塔罗·马丁内斯头球绝杀（梅西助攻），扭转了戈登的先入一球。卫冕冠军在7 月 19 日对阵西班牙的决赛中处于劣势（DraftKings/bet365 均为+125），但正冲击卫冕——上一次实现此壮举的还是1958-62年的巴西。

players.name: Lionel Messi
players.reason_en: Set up both Argentina goals in the 2-1 semi-final comeback over England (assists for Enzo Fernández and Lautaro Martínez), moving to 8 goals and 4 assists — overtaking Mbappé on the Golden Boot assist tiebreak. Golden Ball odds shortened sharply to around -250 after the display. One game left, his self-declared final World Cup, in the final vs Spain on July 19.
players.reason_zh: 在2-1逆转英格兰的半决赛中为阿根廷两粒进球均送出助攻（分别助攻恩佐·费尔南德斯和劳塔罗·马丁内斯），个人数据升至8球4助攻——凭助攻数反超姆巴佩登顶金靴榜。此役过后金球奖赔率大幅收窄至约-250。他所说的谢幕之战只剩7 月 19 日对阵西班牙的决赛。

players.name: Lamine Yamal
players.reason_en: Spain reached the final with a 2-0 semi-final win over France, Yamal again destabilising a top-tier back line and drawing the foul that led to Oyarzabal's opening penalty. DraftKings has him at roughly +800 for the Golden Ball; a strong final for the tournament favourites would put him firmly in the conversation.
players.reason_zh: 西班牙2-0击败法国晋级决赛，亚马尔再次冲击顶级后防线，并为球队赢得点球（奥亚萨瓦尔主罚破门）。DraftKings金球奖赔率约为+800；若在决赛中延续出色表现，作为夺冠热门的一员，他有望跻身金球奖有力竞争者之列。

players.name: Rodri
players.reason_en: The tournament's biggest Golden Ball mover — his midfield masterclass in Spain's semi-final win over France crashed his odds from around 33/1 to roughly 4/1. Anchoring Spain's control through the knockout rounds, he's now a genuine dark-horse contender heading into the July 19 final.
players.reason_zh: 本届金球奖赔率变动最大的球员——在西班牙淘汰法国的半决赛中送出中场大师级表现，赔率从约33/1骤降至4/1左右。他在淘汰赛阶段持续主导西班牙的中场掌控，如今已是7 月 19 日决赛前一位真正的黑马级竞争者。

players.name: Jude Bellingham
players.reason_en: Scored the 90+8' winner as a substitute in England's wild 6-4 bronze-medal win over France, taking his tournament tally to 7 — a new record for the most goals by an England player at a major tournament. Out of the title race with England already eliminated, so Golden Ball odds remain long (around +3500) despite the milestone.
players.reason_zh: 在英格兰6-4逆转法国的疯狂季军战中，贝林厄姆第90+8分钟替补建功锁定胜局，个人本届进球数升至7球——创下英格兰球员在大赛中的历史进球纪录。由于英格兰已无缘冠军，金球奖赔率虽创纪录仍维持较高（约+3500）。

players.name: Kylian Mbappé
players.reason_en: Scored twice (48', 66') in France's 4-6 bronze-medal loss to England, moving to 10 Golden Boot goals — two clear of Messi (8) with his tournament now over — and becoming the World Cup's all-time leading scorer with 22 career goals. The Golden Boot milestone is huge, but Golden Ball odds remain long since France finished outside the final.
players.reason_zh: 姆巴佩在法国4-6不敌英格兰的季军战中梅开二度（第48、66分钟），本届进球数升至10球——以两球优势领先梅西（8球），且个人本届赛事已结束；同时他以生涯22球超越历史纪录，成为世界杯历史射手王。金靴里程碑意义重大，但由于法国无缘决赛，金球奖赔率仍然偏高。

fixtures.reason_en: Spain are +125 favourites (FanDuel/DraftKings, 18-19 Jul; Kalshi has them at 58%) riding a 37-match unbeaten streak, with Yamal and Rodri both in career-best form after shutting down Mbappé, Olise and Dembélé in the semi. Argentina have trailed or been level after 90 minutes in all four knockout games yet won every one — 12 of their 19 goals have come after the 75th minute — so a late twist is live. Golden Boot subplot: Mbappé finished on 10 after a brace in the bronze match, so Messi (8) needs multiple goals today to catch him.
fixtures.reason_zh: 西班牙以37场不败战绩为依托，FanDuel/DraftKings（7 月 18-19 日）赔率+125领先，Kalshi预测胜率58%；亚马尔与罗德里正处于生涯最佳状态，半决赛联手锁死姆巴佩、奥利塞与登贝莱。阿根廷本届淘汰赛四场比赛90分钟内均落后或战平，却全部逆转取胜——19粒进球中有12粒发生在第75分钟之后，因此决赛仍有爆冷可能。金靴悬念：姆巴佩在季军战梅开二度后以10球收官，梅西（8球）今日需梅开多球才能追平。
